title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
